scripts.verify:web: pnpm --filter @proxy/webapp lint && pnpm --filter @proxy/webapp typecheck && pnpm --filter @proxy/webapp build
scripts.verify:desktop: pnpm --filter @proxy/desktopapp lint && pnpm --filter @proxy/desktopapp typecheck && pnpm --filter @proxy/desktopapp build
scripts.verify:mobile: pnpm --filter @proxy/mobileapp lint && pnpm --filter @proxy/mobileapp typecheck && pnpm --filter @proxy/mobileapp build
scripts.verify:all: pnpm run verify:web && pnpm run verify:desktop && pnpm run verify:mobile
